author: aamodbhatt
name: 1-Hour Warmdown 9x512 on 1xH100
blurb: Non-record unlimited-compute run on 1xH100 with baseline 9x512 architecture and scheduler warmdown tuning (WARMDOWN_ITERS=100). Trained for 1 hour to show meaningful quality gains under the 16,000,000-byte artifact cap while awaiting grant-backed 8xH100 runs.
